---
title: "CoMMA sample workflow"
format: html
---

## Example script for using CoMMA

### Loading data

```{r load_libraries}
library(tidyverse)
library(plyranges)
#library(CoMMA)
```

```{r input_methylation_data}
paths <- list(wt1 = "./data-raw/wt1_mg.bed",
              wt2 = "./data-raw/wt2_mg.bed",
              wt3 = "./data-raw/wt3_mg.bed")

l <- vector(mode = "list", length = length(paths))
for(i in 1:length(paths)) {
  r <- buildMicrobeMethyl(path,
                          "./ncbi_dataset/ncbi_dataset/data/GCF_000005845.2/genomic.gff",
                          metadata = list(
                            genotype = "anc",
                            sample_type = "colony",
                            sample_name = names(paths[i])
                          ))
  l[[i]] <- r
  #l <- append(l, r)
}

names(l) <- names(paths)
l <- GRangesList(l)

l <- l |> 
  as.data.frame()

x <- l |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = "type",
    values_from = "gene"
  )

```
